templates.nl_query: How many customers are in Seattle?
templates.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.customers WHERE city = 'Seattle'
templates.intent: How many customers are in Seattle?
templates.manifest: How many customers are in a given city?

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM public.customers WHERE city = $1

templates.nl_query: What is the total revenue from Canada?
templates.sql: SELECT SUM(O.total_amount) FROM public.orders O JOIN public.customers C ON O.customer_id = C.customer_id WHERE C.country = 'Canada'
templates.intent: What is the total revenue from Canada?
templates.manifest: What is the total revenue from a given country?

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT SUM(O.total_amount) FROM public.orders O JOIN public.customers C ON O.customer_id = C.customer_id WHERE C.country = $1
parameterized.parameterized_intent: What is the total revenue from $1?

templates.nl_query: What are the top 5 products in Electronics by quantity sold?
templates.sql: SELECT P.product_id, P.name, SUM(OI.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM public.products P JOIN public.order_items OI ON P.product_id = OI.product_id JOIN public.orders O ON OI.order_id = O.order_id WHERE P.category = 'Electronics' GROUP BY P.product_id, P.name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT 5
templates.intent: What are the top 5 products in Electronics by quantity sold?
templates.manifest: What are the top N products in a given category by quantity sold?

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT P.product_id, P.name, SUM(OI.quantity) AS total_quantity FROM public.products P JOIN public.order_items OI ON P.product_id = OI.product_id JOIN public.orders O ON OI.order_id = O.order_id WHERE P.category = $1 GROUP BY P.product_id, P.name ORDER BY total_quantity DESC LIMIT $2
parameterized.parameterized_intent: What are the top $2 products in $1 by quantity sold?

templates.nl_query: Show active customers who have spent more than 500
templates.sql: SELECT C.customer_id, C.full_name, SUM(O.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM public.customers C JOIN public.orders O ON C.customer_id = O.customer_id WHERE C.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY C.customer_id, C.full_name HAVING SUM(O.total_amount) > 500
templates.intent: Show active customers who have spent more than 500
templates.manifest: Show active customers who have spent more than a given amount

parameterized.parameterized_sql: SELECT C.customer_id, C.full_name, SUM(O.total_amount) AS total_spent FROM public.customers C JOIN public.orders O ON C.customer_id = O.customer_id WHERE C.status = 'ACTIVE' GROUP BY C.customer_id, C.full_name HAVING SUM(O.total_amount) > $1
parameterized.parameterized_intent: Show active customers who have spent more than $1

facets.manifest: highly rated products (above a given rating)

value_searches.query: WITH TrigramMetrics AS ( SELECT T."full_name" AS original_value, (T."full_name" <-> $value::text) AS normalized_dist FROM "customers" T WHERE T."full_name" % $value::text ) SELECT original_value AS value, 'customers.full_name' AS columns, 'Customer Name' AS concept_type, normalized_dist AS distance, ''::text AS context FROM TrigramMetrics
value_searches.description: Fuzzy trigram match for customer full name

value_searches.query: WITH TrigramMetrics AS ( SELECT T."city" AS original_value, (T."city" <-> $value::text) AS normalized_dist FROM "customers" T WHERE T."city" % $value::text ) SELECT original_value AS value, 'customers.city' AS columns, 'Customer City' AS concept_type, normalized_dist AS distance, ''::text AS context FROM TrigramMetrics
value_searches.description: Fuzzy trigram match for customer city

value_searches.query: WITH TrigramMetrics AS ( SELECT T."country" AS original_value, (T."country" <-> $value::text) AS normalized_dist FROM "customers" T WHERE T."country" % $value::text ) SELECT original_value AS value, 'customers.country' AS columns, 'Customer Country' AS concept_type, normalized_dist AS distance, ''::text AS context FROM TrigramMetrics
value_searches.description: Fuzzy trigram match for customer country

value_searches.query: WITH TrigramMetrics AS ( SELECT T."name" AS original_value, (T."name" <-> $value::text) AS normalized_dist FROM "products" T WHERE T."name" % $value::text ) SELECT original_value AS value, 'products.name' AS columns, 'Product Name' AS concept_type, normalized_dist AS distance, ''::text AS context FROM TrigramMetrics
value_searches.description: Fuzzy trigram match for product name

value_searches.query: WITH TrigramMetrics AS ( SELECT T."category" AS original_value, (T."category" <-> $value::text) AS normalized_dist FROM "products" T WHERE T."category" % $value::text ) SELECT original_value AS value, 'products.category' AS columns, 'Product Category' AS concept_type, normalized_dist AS distance, ''::text AS context FROM TrigramMetrics
value_searches.description: Fuzzy trigram match for product category
